description: Third vertical (n=3 for the config-driven claim). A tough contractor itemizes five line items on a bathroom remodel bid; all must extract, and a fairly-priced binding bid must not flag.

job_fields.scope_summary: gut and redo a 5x8 hall bathroom, new tile, vanity, tub-to-shower conversion

simulated_conversation.message: Calling for a bid on a bathroom remodel - 5 by 8 hall bath, full gut, new tile, vanity, and a tub-to-shower conversion. Standard finishes, you supply materials.
Keystone Remodeling, Frank here. Okay, full gut on a five by eight. Labor's the big one - that's eight thousand. Materials at standard grade, call it thirty two hundred.
Eight thousand labor, thirty two hundred materials. Is there demo and disposal on top, and does this need a permit?

Demo and haul-away is six fifty. Tub-to-shower conversion means we're moving the drain, so a plumbing permit - that's three fifty including me pulling it. And there's a four hundred dollar dumpster fee.
So eight thousand labor, thirty two hundred materials, six fifty demo, three fifty permit, four hundred dumpster - twelve thousand six hundred. Is that a firm written bid?
That's a fixed-price contract, good for thirty days. We don't do surprise change orders unless you change the scope.

tool_calls.params_as_json: {"outcome": "quote_given", "company_name": "Keystone Remodeling", "base_price": 8000, "line_items": [{"label": "Labor", "amount": 8000, "is_optional_or_conditional": false}, {"label": "Materials (standard grade)", "amount": 3200, "is_optional_or_conditional": false}, {"label": "Demo and disposal", "amount": 650, "is_optional_or_conditional": false}, {"label": "Plumbing permit", "amount": 350, "is_optional_or_conditional": false}, {"label": "Dumpster fee", "amount": 400, "is_optional_or_conditional": false}], "total_price": 12600, "binding": true}
